title: Alone
why_this_song: Alone by Heart (1987) — selected for the English-through-music catalog. Use the sing-along prompts and exercises to drill pronunciation, vocabulary, and listening comprehension.

vocab_hooks.note: Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I wonder where you are tonight"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "Till now"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I always got by on my own"
Appears 2 times; first heard in: "I never really cared until I met you"

teaching_notes_md:
## Teaching notes

- Times are estimated from community-synced lyrics and may be off by 1–2 seconds.
- Start with the sing-along prompt, then move to listen-and-fill.
- For B1+ students, focus on the discussion questions.
copyright_notice: Short fair-use lyric excerpts only (Brazilian Lei 9.610/98 art. 46 VIII). No full lyrics stored.

exercises.prompt_en: How many times do you hear the word "alone" in the whole song?
exercises.prompt_pt: Quantas vezes você ouve a palavra "alone" na música inteira?

exercises.prompt_en: Put these three lines in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: Coloque estes três versos na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I hear the ticking of the clock
And now it chills me to the bone
And my love for you is still unknown

exercises.prompt_en: And these three — put them in the order they appear in the song:
exercises.prompt_pt: E estes três — coloque na ordem em que aparecem na música:

excerpts.text: I'm lying here the room's pitch dark
To touch your lips and hold you tight
I always got by on my own

exercises.prompt_en: If you could change the ending of the story told in "Alone", what would happen instead?
exercises.prompt_pt: Se você pudesse mudar o final da história contada em "Alone", o que aconteceria?

exercises.prompt_en: Describe the mood of "Alone" in three adjectives. What part of the song makes you feel that way?
exercises.prompt_pt: Descreva o clima de "Alone" em três adjetivos. Que parte da música te faz sentir isso?

exercises.prompt_en: Who in your life would you dedicate "Alone" to, and what line captures what you want to say to them?
exercises.prompt_pt: Para quem da sua vida você dedicaria "Alone", e qual verso resume o que você quer dizer para essa pessoa?

exercises.prompt_en: Write the full form of each contraction:
exercises.prompt_pt: Escreva a forma completa de cada contração:
